case_title: REGINA MUNOZ VS. CARLOS GABRIEL CALAMATEO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, REGINA AS TO DEFENDANT CALAMATEO, CARLOS GABRIEL AKA CARLOS VILLEGAS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CMG SALES MARKETING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, REGINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALAMATEO, CARLOS GABRIEL AKA CARLOS VILLEGAS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CMG SALES MARKETING $2,547.18 PRINCIPAL, $12.61 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,713.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
